title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: ANC mode switching between Adaptive and Standard during a call with Transparency pre-enabled results in different post-call ANC/Transparency behavior across Emu/Osprey/Tern vs Lark/Peregrine devices
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Set preconditions: ANC Mode = OFF, ANC Type = Adaptive (or Standard).
4. Set Transparency Mode = ON, Transparency Type = Environment (or Speech).
5. Start or join a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or Mobile call).
6. Observe that ANC turns ON with the previously selected type (Adaptive or Standard), and Transparency becomes greyed out and OFF.
7. Tap the Transparency toggle in the app.
8. Observe the popup informing that Transparency is not available during a call. Dismiss the popup.
9. In Audio Settings, change ANC between Adaptive and Standard.
10. Verify the user can switch between Adaptive and Standard during the call.
12. On Emu/Osprey/Tern devices: Verify ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to OFF (with previous value preserved).
13. On Lark/Peregrine devices: Verify ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to ON (with previous value preserved).
14. Tap the ANC toggle and the Transparency toggle.
15. Verify the user can move freely between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: On Emu/Osprey/Tern: After the call, ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call; Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to OFF with the previous value preserved. On Lark/Peregrine: After the call, ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call; Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to ON with the previous value preserved. In both cases, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes freely after the call.
